subtitle: LIVE TRACKING & RESULTS
tagline: SHARE YOUR RACE OR TRAINING WITH YOUR FRIENDS & FAMILY
Logotagline: Livio - official tracking & results app for the most beautiful races

Event.title: Event Name
Event.description: You can start your live tracking from 1 hour before your start. Be sure to keep this app open all the time and do not close it!

status.gpsActive: GPS Active - Waiting for race to start

tracking.manualStartEnabled: Manual start mode enabled. You can start sending data anytime.
tracking.waitingForRace: GPS activated. Data will be sent when race starts.
tracking.waitingForRaceNoTime: GPS activated. Waiting for race information.
tracking.backgroundNotificationBody: Your location is being tracked for the race.

bgPermission.title: Allow {applicationName} to access this device's location even when closed or not in use?
bgPermission.message: {applicationName} shares your live position with your followers during a race, even when the app is closed or not in use. To enable this, please choose "{backgroundPermissionOptionLabel}".

battery.title: Enable Background Tracking
battery.message: For reliable GPS tracking during your race, please allow unrestricted battery usage. This prevents Android from pausing location updates while the screen is off.
battery.revertMessage: You can revert battery usage back to Optimized in Settings → Apps → Livio → Battery.

alerts.overrideMessage: Start sending location data immediately, bypassing the race start time?

errors.missingInfoDescription: Participant or event information not available
errors.permissionDescription: Location permission is required to track your progress
errors.gpsErrorDescription: Unable to get your location. Please check your GPS settings.

earlyTracking.title: Race Not Started Yet
earlyTracking.message: Your race starts in {{hours}}. Do you still want to enable background location tracking?

powerSaving.title: Battery saver is on
powerSaving.messageAndroid: Battery Saver can stop GPS tracking in the background. Please turn it off before you start tracking.
powerSaving.messageIos: Low Power Mode can interrupt GPS tracking in the background. Open the Settings app → Battery → turn off Low Power Mode, then come back and tap START TRACKING again.

startConfirm.title: Start Live Tracking?
startConfirm.message: Your live location will be shared with your followers throughout the race. Keep Livio running and your phone with you until you finish. Ready to go?

fanEmail.title: Stay in the loop
fanEmail.description: Enter your email and we'll send you race updates, results, and the occasional Livio news. No account needed—just your email.
fanEmail.savedMessage: We'll keep you posted on race updates.
